transcript.text: Hey, Will.
Hey, how's it going?
Good.
How are you doing?
Not too bad.
Long time no see.
Yeah.
How are you?
How was your holiday?
It was good.
You know, back in, back in action next week or last week, time warp, uh, feeling, feeling like I'm, you know, actually caught up with, with things now, which feels nice.
How about yourself?
Uh, good, good.
Nothing, nothing too crazy.
Just, um, you know, just kind of hung out.
Didn't really do anything too, too exciting.
Um, but yeah, good to be back and, in the thick of things.
Nice.
Yeah.
Those quiet holidays can definitely be worth it.
Yeah, for sure.
Let's my screen really quick.

I only have a few notes because I know we met last week and talked about a few things, but didn't want a week to go by, you know, before a biweekly starts and then end up three weeks out without chatting.
Yeah.
So, super quick updates.
We'll have the Otter and 11Lab JSON files over to you by today.
We were actually able to push those through in advance.
And then we'll have six new Google Docs for your review by the end of today as well.
Cool.
Yeah.
And then the other six JSON files will be over to you on Thursday.
So we're hitting that Tuesday, Thursday cadence that we talked about.
Cool.
Yeah, no, sounds good.
And yeah, like the Otter one, that was probably partially my, yeah, I just missed it.
Because, you know, like their web, their URL is Otter.ai, but like realistic.
They're known in the market as Otter, not Otter.ai, so, yeah, that was my fault.
And then, yeah, just on the other ones, like, I think they're getting better.
I think we're getting into a better rhythm overall.
But, yeah, let's see how this goes.
This is reminding me I should actually take a look at the spreadsheet as well today.
But, yeah, I think, like, let's see how it goes the next week.
And if we feel like, you know, we're getting continuing to improve, then maybe I'll bring you into a couple other things I'm doing just from, like, a tracking and tagging perspective.
Perfect.
Yeah, that would be great.
I know we did a quick look through of the revisions that you sent.
I noticed, like, some patterns that we can find in that, you know, initial, like, pricing at a glance section for, you know, some refined accuracy.
would you.

So things there that we can tailor, and then in Metronome's take, like really making sure that we're avoiding that overly promotional language and being a little bit more like use case focused, even though we're still talking about the benefits and more of that analysis piece, make sure we can tighten up that language a little bit as well.
Cool.
Yeah, I think, yeah, I'm just kind of clicking through this now.
But yeah, I think we should be good.
I think this went a little bit better this week.
So yeah, I think that's kind of my whole thing is like, as long as we can keep optimizing, obviously, like getting better where we need to.
Totally.
That'll be a, that'll be a positive.
Yep.
Agreed.
As far as tracking and things go, I did start poking around GSC and notice that these pages aren't automatically getting indexed.
So it's something my team is working on requesting to make sure that that doesn't.
Impact traffic, especially since it's a newer project, I wanted to make sure that was happening.
So we'll keep an eye on that.
It's not a terrible lift for us to manually request that indexing.
And hopefully in a couple of weeks, Google starts to just pick it up on its own.
But wanted to flag that as a piece that we've got our eye on as well.
Cool.
Yeah, that sounds good.
Slick.
And then the only other update I had in regards to the sources, you mentioned wanting to see those at the top of Google Docs as well.
Looked into it a little bit.
So we're currently adding our like seed sources, which is where our research initially starts.
And then our deep researcher pulls a ton of different material.
And so we need to do a little bit of pipeline updates to make sure that we have a consolidated list of the specific sources that are used based on that deep research.
Because it doesn't use every single one of them.
So I just want to make sure that we've got accurate information for you at the top of those.
But that's another piece that we're sort of optimizing for you.
Yeah.

Yeah, so, I mean, just to make sure that I have, like, my contact, like, the context behind this is, like, there are times, like, when I'll do a review, because, like, part of this exercise, I think, is helpful for me to, like, go through and make sure that I have, like, background knowledge on the pricing model itself.
And so that helps me kind of reinforce my own learning.

And so there are some cases where, like, I've done my own research effectively, where I've, like, done some searches or whatever, and I haven't found much or I haven't found any, like, publicly available information.

And so I just want to make sure that we have a catalog of the sources that we're using, because there could be a situation where, again, I'm thinking, like, five steps down the road where somebody comes to us and they're, maybe they're on our sales team, or maybe they're somebody else, and they say, this is, like, this is wrong, or this isn't the right pricing model.
I just want to make sure that we have a backdrop to where, like, oh, yeah, we sourced it from this.
This location and maybe that location was updated six months ago and they've pushed a new update or something like that.
know, like, I just want to make sure that we have that trail so that we can point back to something in this in case this has happened.
It hasn't happened yet, but like, I just want to make sure that we have the sources available.
Totally.
Yeah.
Want to cover your bases.
That makes sense.
So, yeah.
So if you could do that, I think there's a, most of them have been like at the top of the page and like, for the most part, a lot of these, they already have their pricing page, which is fine.
I think it was only like one or two of them where it's like, they don't publicly list their price or you have to like, through like different threads.
So, so yeah.
Anyways, that's just the context.
Yeah, no, that's, that's helpful.
And I'll make sure my team has that as well as we're, yeah, putting all those refinements in, but totally makes sense.
Thank you.
you.
Otherwise, anything top of mind for you?
know this was a really quick connection.
No, I think we're good.
I think we can do a sync on most of this stuff.
Again, I think we're getting into a better rhythm and hopefully we can get even more of these pages out.
think just if you can just do me this favor, like, I guess it'll be like four weeks from now.
But when we get to a point where we've gone through those, like, top 40 effectively that I listed, can you just Slack me and I can go back through and see where some of these are at?
Or it might just be worth us doing an audit to make sure that we have everything that we want in there.
Like, I think we do, but there might be some new pricing models that have come out or new companies that, you know, we need to examine or want to examine.
They're doing something differently.
So, so if you can just do me that favor, that'd be appreciated.
Yeah.
And as far as that audit, is that something we could probably.
We support their, are thinking both like optimizing existing pages and content for those companies and then also considering companies that we can continue to build out for the pricing index?
I'm thinking more just in terms of breadth and depth.
Like, do we have all of the, like, I know we're like anchored on AI companies predominantly or like AI type criteria, but like, do we have like a broad enough view on our market?
Are there other areas where we want to focus?
And maybe that's just like something I need to noodle on, but like, yeah, just making sure that we have like a broad scope to capture attention for these new models.
But then also like, do we have the level of depth in one vertical as an example?
Like, I think like voice and image generation, you can go super deep on that as well.
And I think we've got a lot of those companies in there.
And I just, yeah, I don't know.
I think we can probably pull up in a few weeks and just kind of look at that.
Yeah, no, that totally makes sense.
I just wanted to make sure that I had, again, that context as I'm putting that list together and bringing that conversation back around.
Cool.
Yeah, appreciate it.
Yeah, no worries.
Well, if anything else comes up, feel free to ping me like you usually do.
And I guess I'll chat with you in a couple weeks.
Yeah, sounds good.
Hope you have a great week, and we'll talk to you soon.
Yeah, thanks, good.
Bye.
See you, bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Quick sync on content delivery, quality, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Delivery:** GrowthX is on a consistent Tuesday/Thursday cadence for JSON files and Google Docs, with the first batch delivered today.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Quality Improvement:** GrowthX is refining content based on feedback, focusing on accuracy in the "Pricing at a Glance" section and a use-case-focused tone in "Metronome's Take."](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Source Tracking:** GrowthX is updating its pipeline to add a consolidated list of *all* research sources to each Google Doc, creating an audit trail for pricing data.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [**Future Audit:** A full content audit is planned for \~4 weeks to assess the pricing index's breadth and depth after the initial 40 companies are covered.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

## Topics

### Content Delivery & Cadence

  - [GrowthX has established a consistent delivery cadence for pricing content:](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Tuesdays:** 6 JSON files & 6 Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Thursdays:** 6 JSON files](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Today's Delivery:**](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Otter & 11Labs JSON files (delivered early)](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [6 new Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Next Delivery:**](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [6 JSON files (due Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Content Quality & Process Improvements

  - [**Feedback-Driven Refinements:** GrowthX is implementing specific changes based on Will's feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [**"Pricing at a Glance":** Improve accuracy by identifying and applying recurring patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [**"Metronome's Take":** Shift from promotional language to a use-case-focused, analytical tone.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Source Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Problem:** Google Docs currently list only "seed sources," not all sources used in deep research.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will update its pipeline to provide a consolidated list of every source used in the final analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To create an audit trail for pricing data, enabling Metronome to validate information and respond to inquiries (e.g., from sales) about potential discrepancies.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Indexing Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Problem:** New content pages are not being automatically indexed by Google.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX is manually requesting indexing via Google Search Console (GSC) to prevent traffic loss and will monitor for automatic indexing to resume.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Future Audit & Expansion

  - [**Plan:** A full content audit will be conducted in \~4 weeks, after the initial 40 companies are covered.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [**Scope:** The audit will assess the pricing index's:](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
      - [**Breadth:** Market coverage (e.g., AI vs. other verticals).](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
      - [**Depth:** Vertical-specific analysis (e.g., voice/image generation).](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Deliver 6 JSON files by Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Implement source tracking updates in the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [Continue manual indexing via GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [Slack Will in \~4 weeks to schedule the content audit.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Review today's deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Monitor content quality and consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/YrayaP2Dh26EUErZzt46mNchzruxx8Xy?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

action_items.description: Update pipeline to consolidate deep-research sources; add accurate sources to top of Google Docs
Slack Will when top 40 pages complete; then Will reviews and schedules audit
